reason: The market is exhibiting characteristics of Distribution as significant regulatory allegations against a major exchange introduce substantial uncertainty and downside risk, prompting investors to de-risk despite compelling long-term bullish narratives around AI integration with crypto. This creates a volatile environment where caution is paramount.
